title: activate_subscription_atomic: payment+invoice delete in one tx prevents double-activation
description: store.rs activate_subscription_atomic() wraps the subscription upsert and invoice delete in a single SQLite transaction. This is essential: if the relay restarts between the two writes, either the old code would activate twice (invoice not deleted) or lose the payment (subscription not written). A contributor might suggest separating them for clarity — this should be resisted. The atomicity guarantee is load-bearing for payment safety.
